message:
chore: bump version to 0.1.40 for release

Includes fixes since 0.1.39:
- fix(concurrency): serialize mutating commands via .write.lock (#243)
- fix(concurrency): restore Phase 5 auto-flush and fix backoff cap
- fix(concurrency): harden ensure_known_metadata_defaults for concurrent readers (#243)

Upstream frankensqlite fixes (via path patches):
- fix(btree,core): return B-tree pages to freelist on DROP TABLE/INDEX (#69)
- fix(btree): free overflow chains from interior index cells in free_subtree_pages

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "beads_rust"
-version = "0.1.39"
+version = "0.1.40"
 edition = "2024"
 rust-version = "1.88"
 description = "Agent-first issue tracker (SQLite + JSONL)"
